title: Cinematic Character Design Board AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Character Design Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end film studio character design board for 35-year-old adult Asian male cyberpunk detective in rainy neon megacity. Subject: hero bust portrait, front side back turnarounds, expression studies, weapon props, fabric details, psychological profile, and noir film still supplies the swappable board sections detail for this template. 35-year-old adult Asian male cyberpunk detective is presented as the central character, showing tired, cold, sharp, and emotionally guarded, realistic skin or surface detail, and long weathered coat, mechanical eye, compact scanner, and compact sidearm holster clearly readable across the board. Scene: rainy neon megacity informs the background atmosphere, costume logic, props, and cinematic stills while the board remains on a neutral gray studio presentation surface. Composition: Single concept-art board layout with a dominant bust portrait, front/side/back full-body turnarounds, expression studies, prop and weapon callouts, costume fabric detail crops, psychological profile panel, and one cinematic film-still moment. Signature Elements: Main bust portrait, three-view character sheet, expression row, weapon and prop design, costume material swatches, psychological profile, cinematic still, and professional studio-board organization. Style: Hollywood film concept design with premium studio presentation, neutral gray backdrop, realistic anatomy, detailed fabric and hardware rendering, restrained UI labels, story-heavy mood, and 4K production-art clarity. Color Palette: Neutral gray board foundation with palette accents derived from rainy neon megacity, controlled cinematic contrast, realistic skin tones, and material-specific color notes for costume and props. Lighting: Cinematic key light on the main portrait, soft studio fill for turnarounds, small rim highlights on props and fabric details, and atmospheric light cues inside the film-still panel. Camera: Orthographic clean views for turnarounds, close portrait crop for the hero bust, macro crops for fabric and props, and a cinematic wide crop for the film still. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
